sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_float_table (id Int32, value UInt32, str_value String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_float_table (id, value, str_value) VALUES (1, 4294967295, 'string_value_1'), (2, 123456, NULL), (3, 0, '0.0');

SELECT id, reinterpretAsFloat32(value) AS float_value, reinterpretAsFloat32(NULLIF(str_value, 'string_value_1')) AS reinterpreted_str_value FROM test_float_table WHERE value > 10000 OR (str_value IS NOT NULL AND reinterpretAsFloat32(CAST(NULL AS UInt32)) < 0.5) ORDER BY float_value DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_join_table (id Int32, related_id Int32, value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_join_table (id, related_id, value) VALUES (1, 1, 3.14), (2, 1, 2.71), (3, 2, NULL);

SELECT tj.id, reinterpretAsFloat32(tj.value) AS reinterpret_float, tj.value OR (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM test_float_table WHERE value > 50000) AS logical_check FROM test_join_table tj JOIN test_float_table tf ON tj.related_id = tf.id WHERE tf.str_value IS NULL OR tj.value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY reinterpret_float;

SELECT id, value, reinterpretAsFloat32(value + reinterpretAsFloat32(0)) AS double_interpret FROM test_float_table GROUP BY id, value HAVING reinterpretAsFloat32(value) > 0.0 OR (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_join_table WHERE value < 0) > 0;
SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(value) AS float_value, (reinterpretAsFloat32(NULL) OR reinterpretAsFloat32(value)) AS union_test FROM test_float_table HAVING float_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, reinterpretAsFloat32(0) AS reinterpreted_zero, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_float_table WHERE str_value = '' OR str_value IS NULL) AS null_check FROM test_float_table ORDER BY reinterpreted_zero DESC;
